properties.description: Every Tuesday during school term time, we serve hot food, tea, coffee and snacks. We are open to all from 12 - 2pm, with hot food from 12.30. This is a donation based lunch where you pay what you can and is free for High School pupils. We aim to provide a calm, warm space in our church where you can have lunch and spend time with others. We close this service during the school holidays We also do Open Church at St Mary's Church, Glencoe from 11.30 - 2pm every Thursday, all year round, where we serve soup, tea, coffee and snacks. This is donations based and everyone is welcome. There is a short service at 11.30 which everyone is welcome to join or just drop in after 12pm for food and drinks
properties.title: Cafe Kinloch, St Paul's Church, Kinlochleven

properties.address: Church of Scotland Riverside Road, Kinlochleven, PH50 4QH
properties.description: Warm space open to all Fridays from 12.30pm
properties.title: Kinlochleven Parish Church

properties.address: Units 1a & 1b Network Court, Kinlochleven, Argyll PH50 4SH
properties.title: Kinlochleven Salvation Army Church and Community Centre

properties.address: St Marys Episcopal Church, Glencoe, Argyll PH49 4HS
properties.description: A weekly service in the church followed by hot drinks, cake and biscuits, light lunch and plenty of conversation in the church hall afterwards. Service 11:00-11:30 / Refreshments 11:30-14:00. Pop in for a quick cuppa, or stay for the whole afternoon! Everybody welcome.
properties.title: Open Church Glencoe

properties.description: Every Thursday, all year round, we have Open Church in the village of Glencoe. At 11.30 - 12pm we have a short church service and from 12 - 2pm we serve soup, hot drinks and snacks. Everyone is welcome to come alone to either or both! This is donation based. We aim to provide a warm, welcoming space. On Tuesdays during school term time, we also do Cafe Kinloch in Kinlochleven. That is also a donation based lunch, where we provide hot food, hot drinks and snacks.
properties.title: Open Church, Glencoe
